code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(haystack)
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(needle)
      if string.contains(haystack, needle)
        print("YES")
      else
        print("NO")
      end
    when None
      print("NO")
    end
  when None
    print("NO")
  end
end
